backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with CMS content management (about text, features, game details, social links), password protection, user profile storage, and blob storage via mixins for authorization and access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering fixes for the admin Internet Identity login origin error, press kit CMS text rendering, and password gate modal functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, pages, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app with Google Fonts preconnect for Fredoka One and Inter, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component setting up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /press-kit, /admin), QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, a shared Header layout, and a BodyTextColorApplier that syncs the backend's body text color to a CSS variable.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenViewer: Fullscreen image overlay component with Escape key and click-to-close support, a close button with stopPropagation, and body scroll locking while open.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Minimal site header showing only a Press Kit nav link and a dark/light mode toggle, hidden entirely on the /admin route.
frontend/src/components/ImageWithFallbac: Reusable image component that shows an animated skeleton while loading and an 'Image unavailable' placeholder on error.
frontend/src/components/MediaDownloadBut: Button component that programmatically triggers a ZIP file download of all press kit screenshots via a dynamically created anchor element.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterPlaceh: Non-functional newsletter signup form with an email input and subscribe button, intended as a placeholder for future implementation.
frontend/src/components/PasswordGateModa: A modal component that prompts users for a password to access the press kit, verifying it against the backend actor and storing the result in sessionStorage on success.
frontend/src/components/ScreenshotsGalle: Displays a grid of six game screenshots as clickable thumbnails that open a fullscreen viewer when clicked.
frontend/src/components/SocialMediaSecti: Renders an Instagram link with icon if a valid URL is provided, otherwise renders nothing.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Shows a video thumbnail with a play button that, when clicked, replaces itself with an embedded YouTube iframe using the extracted video ID.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: Provides a light/dark theme context with persistence via localStorage, toggling dark-mode CSS classes on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, initializing admin access control when an identity is present, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a collection of React Query read hooks and mutations for fetching and updating press kit content (game details, features, links, colors, etc.) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and adds utility styles for background images, dark mode inversions, screenshot borders, and fullscreen viewer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that allows authenticated admins to log in via Internet Identity and update press kit content fields including about text, features, game details, social links, body text color, and password protection settings.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Simple landing page displaying the game logo and an embedded newsletter signup iframe from Sendinblue, with a footer crediting caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/pages/PressKitPage.tsx: Press kit page that displays game content (about, features, game details, screenshots, video, social links) fetched from the backend, with optional password gate protection via a modal before content is shown.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts, border radii, animations, and enables dark mode via class, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 19, summarizing the press kit webpage layout, known issues (CMS errors, missing UI elements, deployment bugs), and existing features with their requirements and versions.
